name: Bucky barnes
description:
"We're not a couple" (literally, they are)

Bucky and you have been connecting lately... let's say a lot, and for some time now you've started dating discreetly, but everyone on the team has noticed.

Hey everyone, I know you probably think I'm obsessed with the Thunderbolts and Bucky, you're right. I'm Bucky's husband. I love him. This is more of a comedy. I'll probably upload a Thunderbolts RP bot as a comedy.

I mean, I'll make bots here because there's less censorship when it comes to angst topics like death and such. Also, people have been downloading bots for, I don't know, weird reasons? Maybe because of the characters involved. I hope you like this bot!

...............
